stages.concept:
# Unit 059: 조동사 + have + p.p. - 개념톡

👩‍🏫 선생님: 오늘은 **조동사 + have + 과거분사(p.p.)** 형태에 대해 배워볼까요?

> You **should have studied** harder.
> 너는 더 열심히 공부했어야 했다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: 이 형태는 **과거의 일에 대한 추측, 후회, 비난** 등을 나타내요.

👩‍🏫 선생님: **should have + p.p.** — ~했어야 했다 (후회/비난)

> I **should have** brought an umbrella.
> 나는 우산을 가져왔어야 했다.

> You **shouldn't have** said that.
> 너는 그렇게 말하지 말았어야 했다.

**Q. 다음 중 '과거에 대한 강한 추측'을 나타내는 것을 고르세요.**
1. I should have studied harder. (후회)
2. He must have been very tired. ✅ (강한 추측)
3. You could have told me earlier. (가능했는데 안 함)

👩‍🏫 선생님: **must have + p.p.** — ~했음에 틀림없다 (과거에 대한 강한 추측)

> He **must have** been very tired.
> 그는 매우 피곤했음에 틀림없다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: **may/might have + p.p.** — ~했을지도 모른다 (과거에 대한 약한 추측)

> She **may have** missed the train.
> 그녀는 기차를 놓쳤을지도 모른다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: **could have + p.p.** — ~할 수 있었는데 (안 했음)

> You **could have** told me earlier.
> 너는 나에게 더 일찍 말해줄 수 있었잖아.

> I **could have** won the game.
> 나는 그 경기에서 이길 수 있었는데.

🧑‍🎓 학생: 과거 일에 대해 should have(후회), must have(확신), may have(추측), could have(가능했는데 안 함)! 잘 구별해야겠어요.
stages.practiceA:
# Unit 059: 조동사+have+p.p(과거분사) - 연습문제 A

**01.** 보기 안에서 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
그는 주스를 너무 많이 마신 게 틀림없다.
He must (     ) drunk too much juice.
> **정답** have

---

**02.** 그녀는 열쇠를 잃어버렸을지도 모른다.
She may (     ) lost her key.
> **정답** have

---

**03.** 너는 더 열심히 공부했어야 했다.
You should (     ) studied harder.
> **정답** have

---

**04.** 그는 거짓말을 하지 않았을 수도 있다.
He may not (     ) lied.
> **정답** have

---

**05.** 그들은 이미 도착했을 것이다.
They must (     ) arrived already.
> **정답** have

---

**06.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
She must have went home early.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** went → gone

---

**07.** He should have ate breakfast.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** ate → eaten

---

**08.** They may have forgot the meeting.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** forgot → forgotten

---

**09.** She could have took the bus.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** took → taken

---

**10.** I should have bring my umbrella.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** bring → brought

---

**11.** 우리말에 맞게 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 쓰시오.
그녀는 아팠었음에 틀림없다.
She must been sick.
> **정답** have

---

**12.** 너는 그에게 말했어야 했다.
You should told him.
> **정답** have

---

**13.** 비가 왔었을지도 모른다.
It may rained last night.
> **정답** have

---

**14.** 그는 그 소식을 들었을 것이다.
He must heard the news.
> **정답** have

---

**15.** 나는 더 일찍 출발했어야 했다.
I should left earlier.
> **정답** have

---

**16.** 우리말에 맞게 다음 단어들을 바르게 배열하시오.
그는 피곤했었음에 틀림없다.
must have He been tired
> **정답** He / must / have / been / tired

---

**17.** 너는 우산을 가져왔어야 했다.
should have brought You an umbrella
> **정답** You / should / have / brought / an / umbrella

---

**18.** 그녀는 버스를 놓쳤을지도 모른다.
may She the bus have missed
> **정답** She / may / have / missed / the / bus

---

**19.** 그들은 이미 출발했을 것이다.
must They already have left
> **정답** They / must / have / already / left

---

**20.** 나는 더 열심히 연습했어야 했다.
should have I practiced harder
> **정답** I / should / have / practiced / harder
stages.practiceB:
# Unit 059: 조동사+have+p.p(과거분사) - 연습문제 B

**01.** 다음 빈칸에 공통으로 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
She studied hard. She __________ failed the exam.
He is honest. He __________ lied to us.
cannot have
may have
should have
must have
> **정답** cannot have

---

**02.** 다음 중 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
Amy는 어렸을 때 노래를 배웠음이 틀림없다.
Amy should have learned to sing when she
was young.
Amy must have learned to sing when she
was young.
Amy may have learned to sing when she was
young.
Amy can have learned to sing when she was
young.
> **정답** Amy must have learned to sing when she was
young.

---

**03.** 다음 중 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
He ______________ hard for his exams because his
results were very good.
must have studied
cannot have studied
may have studied
would have studied
> **정답** must have studied

---

**04.** 두 문장의 의미가 같도록 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을
고르시오.
I'm sorry I didn't call you yesterday.
I __________ you yesterday.
should have called
must have called
would have called
might have called
> **정답** should have called

---

**05.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
Amy should have done her homework
yesterday. She submitted it this morning.
Tom must have readed the book. He knew the
story.
Amy may have watched a movie yesterday.
She talked about the characters in the movie
Jake cannot have sung that song. He didn't
know the song.
> **정답** Tom must have readed the book. He knew the story.

---

**06.** 다음 중 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
Tom __________ the train. He arrived on time.
must not have taken
should have taken
cannot have taken
must have taken
> **정답** must have taken

---

**07.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
He must stay up all night last night.
He could have learned Spanish when he was
young.
We should follow his advice.
They may have departed for Seoul yesterday.
> **정답** He must stay up all night last night.

---

**08.** 다음 주어진 문장과 뜻이 같은 문장을 고르시오.
I'm sorry I wasted so much money.
I shouldn't have wasted so much money.
I would have wasted so much money.
I should have wasted so much money.
I couldn't have wasted so much money.
• waste 낭비하다
> **정답** I shouldn't have wasted so much money.

---

**09.** 주어진 우리 말을 영작할 때 틀린 곳을 찾아 바르게 고쳐
쓰시오.
너는 그녀에게 그러한 실수를 하지 말았어야 했다.
You could not have made such a mistake
with her.
> **정답** should, have made

---

**10.** 다음 중 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
Amy는 그와의 약속을 잊었던 것이 틀림없다.
Amy must have forgotten her appointment
with him.
Amy might have forgotten her
appointment with him.
Amy can have forgotten her appointment
with him.
Amy could have forgotten her appointment
with him.
> **정답** Amy must have forgotten her appointment with
him.

---

**11.** 다음 우리말을 영어로 바르게 옮긴 것은?
그녀는 나에게 거짓말을 했을 리가 없다.
She may have told a lie to me.
She must have told a lie to me.
She could have told a lie to me.
She cannot have told a lie to me.
> **정답** She cannot have told a lie to me.

---

**12.** 밑줄 친 부분이 문맥상 알맞지 않은 것을 고르시오.
He must have studied for this exam. He didn't
pass the exam.
She may have gone to bed late last night. she
looks tired.
She must have passed the test. She seems
happy.
She should have skated with safety gear on.
She fell and hurt herself.
• safety gear 안전장비
> **정답** He must have studied for this exam. He didn't pass
the exam.

---

**13.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 맞는 것을 고르시오.
Tom could have learned to play the piano.
Jake must have go to the ranch last week.
Ben may teach English last year.
Amy don't should have joined a law firm.
• ranch 목장
• law firm 법률[변호사] 사무소
> **정답** Tom could have learned to play the piano.

---

**14.** 두 문장의 의미가 같도록 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을
고르시오.
It is possible that he lost his ID card.
He __________ lost his ID card.
should not have
should have
may have
cannot have
> **정답** may have

---

**15.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 맞는 것을 모두 고르시오. [2개]
She might have had a puppy. She bought toys
for a pet dog.
He must have been diligent. He used to work
early in the morning.
She must finished her homework yesterday.
She went to the movie with me.
He doesn't might have played soccer
yesterday. He was at home when I called.
• diligent 근면한
> **정답** He must have been diligent. He used to work early in
the morning., She might have had a puppy. She
bought toys for a pet dog.

---

**16.** 주어진 우리 말을 영작할 때 틀린 곳을 찾아 바르게 고쳐
쓰시오.
그는 어제 축구하다가 다리를 다쳤을지도 모른다.
He must have hurt his leg when he
played soccer yesterday.
> **정답** may, have hurt, played

---

**17.** 다음 중 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
Tom __________ the new shoes yesterday. The
shoes were sold out.
would have bought
should have bought
must have bought
may have bought
> **정답** should have bought

---

**18.** 다음 우리말을 영어로 바르게 옮긴 것은?
너 그 책을 도서관에 반납했어야 했어.
You can have returned the book to the library.
You may have returned the book to the
library.
You must have returned the book to the
library.
You should have returned the book to the
library.
> **정답** You should have returned the book to the library.

---

**19.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
He can have not been
president in the last election.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** have not → not have

---

**20.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
He might lost his new watch
yesterday.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** lost → have lost
stages.descriptive:
# Unit 059 조동사+have+p.p(과거분사)중1 (중등) - 서술형문제

**01.** 주어진 말을 이용하여 질문에 대답하는 문장을
완성하시오.
may, go
A: What did she do yesterday?
B: She  (     )   (     )   (     )  to the library
yesterday.
정답 may, have, gone

---

**02.** 주어진 말을 이용하여 질문에 대답하는 문장을
완성하시오.
힌트 (     ) must, fail, the test
A: What's wrong with him? He looks sad.
B: He studied hard. But he  (     )   (     )  
  (     ) .
정답 must, have, failed, the, test

---

**03.** 주어진 말을 이용하여 질문에 대답하는 문장을
완성하시오.
힌트 (     ) can, send, the package
A: Did she mail the package to Jeffrey?
B: No, she  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )   (     ) .
She doesn't know his address.
정답 cannot (can't), have, sent, the, package

---

**04.** 주어진 표현을 이용하여 문장을 완성하시오.
힌트 (     ) should, fix, the computer
She didn't take an online class today. She 
  (     )   (     )   (     )  yesterday.
정답 should, have, fixed, the, computer

---

**05.** 주어진 표현을 이용하여 문장을 완성하시오.
힌트 (     ) may, lost
She didn't bring the wallet today. She  (     )  
 it.
정답 may, have, lost

---

**06.** 주어진 표현을 이용하여 문장을 완성하시오.
힌트 (     ) must, marry
They are wearing the same ring. They  (     )  
.
정답 must, have, married

---

**07.** 우리말과 같은 뜻이 되도록 조동사와 주어진 말을
이용하여 문장을 완성하시오.
나는 비행기표를 더 빨리 샀어야 했다. [buy, a plane
ticket]
I  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  
sooner.
정답 should, have, bought, a, plane, ticket

---

**08.** 우리말과 같은 뜻이 되도록 조동사와 주어진 말을
이용하여 문장을 완성하시오. (축약형으로)
그가 시험에 떨어졌을 리가 없다. [fail, the exam]
He  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )   (     ) .
정답 can't, have, failed, the, exam

---

**09.** 우리말에 맞게 틀린 부분을 찾아서 고쳐쓰세요.
Bailey는 발표를 아주 잘했다. 그녀는 발표 준비를 많이 했음
에 틀림없다.
Bailey [made]  an excellent presentation. She
[should]  have been prepared a lot for it.
정답 made, must

---

**10.** 우리말에 맞게 틀린 부분을 찾아서 고쳐쓰세요.
Tom는 제 시간에 도착하지 않았다. 그는 다른 기차를 탔을지
도 모른다.
Tom [did not] (     )  arrive in time. He
may take (     )  a different train.
정답 did not, may have taken

---
stages.practical:
# Unit 059: 조동사+have+p.p - 변형문제

**01.** 다음 빈칸에 공통으로 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
She studied hard.
She __________ failed the test.
He is kind.
He __________ said bad things about us. cannot have may have should have must have
> 정답: cannot have

---

**02.** 다음 중 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
Tom은 어렸을 때 피아노를 배웠음이 틀림없다.
Tom should have learned to play piano when he was young.
Tom must have learned to play piano when he was young.
Tom may have learned to play piano when he was young.
Tom can have learned to play piano when he was young.
> 정답: Tom must have learned to play piano when he was

---

**03.** 다음 중 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
She ______________ hard for her exams because her grades were very good. must have studied cannot have studied may have studied would have studied
> 정답: must have studied

---

**04.** 두 문장의 의미가 같도록 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
I'm sorry I didn't text you yesterday.
I __________ you yesterday. should have texted must have texted would have texted might have texted
> 정답: should have texted

---

**05.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
Amy should have done her project yesterday.
She finished it this morning.
Tom must have readed the story.
He knew the ending.
Mina may have watched a movie yesterday.
She talked about the scenes.
Jake cannot have sung that song.
He didn't know the lyrics.
> 정답: Tom must have readed the story. He knew the ending.

---

**06.** 다음 중 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
Amy __________ the bus.
She arrived on time. must not have taken should have taken cannot have taken must have taken
> 정답: must have taken

---

**07.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
He must stay up all night last night.
He could have learned French when he was young.
We should follow her advice.
They may have left for Busan yesterday.
> 정답: He must stay up all night last night.

---

**08.** 다음 주어진 문장과 뜻이 같은 문장을 고르시오.
I'm sorry I wasted so much time.
I shouldn't have wasted so much time.
I would have wasted so much time.
I should have wasted so much time.
I couldn't have wasted so much time.
> 정답: I shouldn't have wasted so much time.

---

**09.** 주어진 우리 말을 영작할 때 틀린 곳을 찾아 바르게 고쳐 쓰시오.
너는 그에게 그러한 실수를 하지 말았어야 했다.
You could not have made such a mistake with him.
> 정답: should, have made

---

**10.** 다음 중 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
Tom은 그녀와의 약속을 잊었던 것이 틀림없다.
Tom must have forgotten his appointment with her.
Tom might have forgotten his appointment with her.
Tom can have forgotten his appointment with her.
Tom could have forgotten his appointment with her.
> 정답: Tom must have forgotten his appointment with

---

**11.** 다음 우리말을 영어로 바르게 옮긴 것은? 그는 나에게 거짓말을 했을 리가 없다. He may have told a lie to me. He must have told a lie to me. He could have told a lie to me. He cannot have told a lie to me.
> 정답: He cannot have told a lie to me.

---

**12.** 밑줄 친 부분이 문맥상 알맞지 않은 것을 고르시오.
He must have studied for this quiz.
He didn't pass the quiz.
She may have gone to bed late last night.
She looks tired.
She must have passed the test.
She seems happy.
She should have worn a helmet.
She fell and got hurt.
> 정답: He must have studied for this quiz. He didn't pass

---

**13.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 맞는 것을 고르시오.
Tom could have learned to play the guitar.
Amy must have go to the farm last week.
Jake may teach math last year.
Mina don't should have joined a debate team.
> 정답: Tom could have learned to play the guitar.

---

**14.** 두 문장의 의미가 같도록 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
It is possible that he lost his bus pass.
He __________ lost his bus pass. should not have should have may have cannot have
> 정답: may have

---

**15.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 맞는 것을 모두 고르시오. [2개]
She might have had a kitten.
She bought toys for a cat.
He must have been hard-working.
He used to work early in the morning.
She must finished her homework yesterday.
She went to the park with me.
He doesn't might have played basketball yesterday.
He was at home when I called.
> 정답: He must have been hard-working. He used to work early in

**16.** 주어진 우리 말을 영작할 때 틀린 곳을 찾아 바르게 고쳐 쓰시오.
그는 어제 농구하다가 손을 다쳤을지도 모른다.
He must have hurt his hand when he played basketball yesterday.
> 정답: may, have hurt, played

**17.** 다음 중 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
Amy __________ the new bag yesterday.
The bags were sold out. would have bought should have bought must have bought may have bought
> 정답: should have bought

**18.** 다음 우리말을 영어로 바르게 옮긴 것은? 너 그 DVD를 가게에 반납했어야 했어. You can have returned the DVD to the shop. You may have returned the DVD to the shop. You must have returned the DVD to the shop. You should have returned the DVD to the shop.
> 정답: You should have returned the DVD to the shop.

**19.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요. He  can  have  not  been  class leader  in  the  last  semester. 틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요.
(생략가능)
> 정답: have not → not have

**20.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요. He  might  lost  his  new  pencil case  yesterday. 틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요.
(생략가능)
> 정답: lost → have lost
